prompt: Create a high-quality 3x4 sticker sheet of a cute anime-style girl with long wavy brown hair, soft glowing skin, glossy eyes, and a red aesthetic outfit. Each sticker should show a different adorable expression and pose such as smiling, winking, sleepy, surprised, pouty, shy, peace sign, finger heart, laughing, blushing, and cute reactions. Add small heart doodles, sparkles, and kawaii emotion symbols around each character. Use soft watercolor shading, detailed digital painting, pastel tones, white sticker borders, and a clean beige background. Make the art look dreamy, aesthetic, charming, ultra-detailed, and social-media sticker pack style.
